vision_profile.current_state: Vivek is a 23-year-old B.Sc CS graduate operating a cyber cafe, already solving basic computer problems for customers.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest obstacle is the lack of formal recognition and structured learning paths to transition his practical skills into a professional IT role.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to convert his daily problem-solving experience into a recognized IT Helpdesk position with a stable salary and career growth.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can confidently handle basic IT support tasks, troubleshoot common hardware/software issues, and provide excellent customer service.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building a strong foundation, formalizing your existing skills into a recognized IT support professional.

science.desc: A customer reports their new printer isn't connecting to their laptop. Walk through the steps to diagnose and resolve the issue, considering both hardware and software aspects.

modules.title: Problem Solving & Diagnostics
lessons: Basic Command Line Tools (ping, ipconfig - conceptual)

modules.title: Customer Service & Communication
lessons: Active Listening & Empathy in IT Support

scenario.title: Mediating a Dispute with a Vendor

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can manage operating system basics, install and configure software effectively, and apply basic scripting for IT tasks.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming proficient in the core software environments that users interact with daily.

modules.title: Operating System Fundamentals
lessons: Introduction to OS Types (Windows, Linux, macOS - conceptual)

video.title: Creating and Managing Local User Accounts
Using Task Manager to End Processes

science.desc: A user reports their computer is running extremely slow. Using system monitoring tools, identify potential culprits (CPU, RAM, Disk usage) and suggest initial troubleshooting steps.

video.title: Updating and Rolling Back Device Drivers

modules.title: Basic Scripting for IT Tasks
lessons: Introduction to Python for IT Automation (from Python for AI)

video.title: Variables and Data Types in Python
Reading and Writing Text Files with Python

scenario.title: Creating a Script to Backup Log Files

video.title: Using Task Scheduler for Python Scripts

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can diagnose and resolve common network connectivity issues, understand basic network infrastructure, and assist with network configurations.
milestones.identity_statement: You are mastering the backbone of all modern IT systems: networking.

modules.title: Networking & Communication Basics
lessons: Introduction to Networking (High Level System Design)
Common Network Devices (Routers, Switches, Access Points)

video.title: Understanding IP Addresses and MAC Addresses

scenario.title: Explaining DHCP to a Non-Technical User

science.desc: A user cannot access a shared network drive. Describe your troubleshooting steps, starting from checking local network settings to verifying server connectivity.

modules.title: Network Troubleshooting Tools & Techniques
lessons: Advanced Command Line Network Tools (tracert, netstat)

video.title: Using Tracert to Map Network Paths

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can identify common security threats, implement basic cybersecurity measures, and educate users on safe computing practices.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming the first line of defense against digital threats, protecting users and systems.

modules.title: Introduction to Cybersecurity
lessons: Fundamentals of Information Security (from High Level System Design - Security)

scenario.title: Responding to a Suspected Malware Infection

science.desc: A user clicked on a suspicious link and now their browser is redirecting to unknown sites. Outline the immediate steps to contain the issue and clean the system.

video.title: Conducting Basic Security Training for Users

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can effectively manage IT service requests, utilize ticketing systems, and contribute to IT service improvement processes.
milestones.identity_statement: You are streamlining IT operations, making support efficient and user-friendly.

modules.title: IT Service Management & Documentation
lessons: Introduction to IT Service Management (ITSM) & ITIL (conceptual)

scenario.title: Creating a FAQ for Common Printer Issues

science.desc: A critical business application is down for multiple users. Describe your immediate actions, communication plan, and how you would escalate this incident according to ITSM principles.

modules.title: Collaboration & IT Tools
lessons: Team Collaboration Tools (e.g., Slack, Teams - conceptual)
Basic Project Management for IT Tasks

scenario.title: Assisting a Remote User with a Software Issue

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can resolve complex, multi-faceted IT issues, manage advanced system configurations, and mentor junior support staff.
milestones.identity_statement: You are evolving into a seasoned troubleshooter, tackling the most challenging IT puzzles.

modules.title: Advanced Diagnostic Techniques
lessons: Advanced Scripting for Automation (Python for AI)

scenario.title: Resolving a 'No Boot Device Found' Error

science.desc: A critical server is experiencing intermittent network drops, but only during peak hours. Detail your approach to diagnose this complex issue, considering both hardware and software factors.

scenario.title: Troubleshooting VPN Connectivity for Remote Users
Managing User Accounts in a Cloud Environment

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You are fully prepared for IT Helpdesk interviews, can articulate your value, and have a clear path for continuous professional growth in IT.
milestones.identity_statement: You are not just a technician, but a valuable asset ready to grow and lead in the IT world.

modules.title: Interview Skills & Resume Building
lessons: Crafting an Impactful IT Helpdesk Resume
Networking for IT Professionals (from Capstone & Career Readiness)

video.title: Highlighting Cyber Cafe Experience on Resume

scenario.title: Tailoring Resume for a Specific Job Posting
Answering 'Tell me about a time you failed'
Explaining DNS Resolution to an Interviewer

science.desc: Describe a challenging technical problem you've solved. How did you approach it, what tools did you use, and what was the outcome?

modules.title: Continuous Learning & Career Growth
lessons: Certifications for IT Helpdesk (CompTIA A+, Network+)
Specialization Paths in IT (Networking, Security, Cloud)
